title: Baylis & Harding Sweet Mandarin & Grapefruit Luxury Hand Care Gift Set - Vegan Friendly (Pack of 1)

features: PAMPERING GIFT: Treat yourself or a loved one to this luxurious hand care gift set, featuring sweet mandarin and grapefruit fragranced products
VEGAN FRIENDLY: Made with vegan-friendly ingredients, this set is perfect for those with ethical preferences
MOISTURISING LOTION: Includes a 300 ml hand & body lotion that helps moisturise and nourish the hands for soft and supple skin
FRAGRANT WASH: Scented sweet mandarin & grapefruit 300 ml hand wash adds a refreshing touch to your daily cleansing routine
BODY CARE ESSENTIALS: Complete your body care routine with this indulgent set, ideal for gifting or self-care treats
description: Product Description A stylish luxury hand care set with added vitamins to leave your hands beautifully cleansed, moisturised and softly scented. This gift set is the perfect stocking filler for any elegant home. Art deco design meets timeless luxury with our enduring Sweet Mandarin & Grapefruit collection. Our most iconic fragrance, composed with beautiful jasmine and layered with sparkling citrus top notes brings a luxe dimension to this classic assortment. An elegant monochrome palette coupled with a geometric print masterfully accented with gold foil accents, perfectly finesses this seasonal collection. Timeless, always understated and elegant; Sweet Mandarin & Grapefruit is our most iconic and best-selling fragrance. Enduring in its appeal, its subtle fragrance, a blend of jasmine and orange with sparkling top notes of sweet mandarin, grapefruit and lemon. Ingredients HAND WASH: Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Phenoxyethanol, Peg-150 Distearate, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Disodium Edta, Citric Acid, Benzophenone-4, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Limonene, Linalool, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes, Ci 19140 (Yellow 5), Ci 14700 (Red 4). HAND & BODY LOTION: Aqua (Water, Eau), Cetearyl Alcohol, Paraffinum Liquidum (Mineral Oil), Stearic Acid, Glyceryl Stearate, Glycerin, Peg-100 Stearate, Phenoxyethanol, Caprylyl Glycol, Carbomer, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Hydroxide, Benzophenone-4, Citral, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Citrus Limon Peel Oil, Eugenol, Limonene, Linalool, Linalyl Acetate, Pinene, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes. Directions Wet hands or body with warm water. Apply a small amount of product (about the size of a quarter for hands, or a golf ball for body) onto hands or a washcloth. Lather and massage gently into skin, avoiding the eye area. Rinse thoroughly and pat dry. Use daily as part of your personal hygiene routine. Safety Warning WARNING: AVOID CONTACT WITH EYES. IF PRODUCT GETS IN THE EYES RINSE IMMEDIATELY WITH CLEAN WARM WATER. IF SKIN IRRITATION OCCURS DISCONTINUE USE. IF IRRITATION PERSISTS CONSULT YOUR DOCTOR. Manufacturer Contact Information Baylis & Harding Plc, B98 7AS, England. RP. MSL, Suite 5385, 27 Upper Pembroke St, Dublin, IE. See more
